summary: Solid rock‑heavy show with a stellar Touch of Grey and strong second set, recorded at decent quality despite unknown source.
review: The concert is praised as an energetic, ‘rockin’ balls‑to‑the‑walls’ performance highlighted by a standout opening Touch of Grey, powerful renditions of Stranger, Stuck Inside of Mobile, Sugar Magnolia, All Along the Watchtower and a solid Box‑of‑Rain encore.  Recording quality is not described in detail but no major flaws are noted, suggesting an acceptable source even though the exact type (soundboard/audience) is unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed 4‑star review emphasizes many strong musical moments and only minor set‑list criticisms; recording quality appears adequate but unspecified.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit complaints about sound; reviewer mentions quadraphonic speaker setup but does not comment on tape or mix clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set never lets up, though the reviewer notes a missed transition from Scarlet Begonias into Fire and wishes for more seamless segues; overall pacing is described as consistently high‑energy.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Recovered from a cold and delivers a muscular Sunshine Daydream; shares a flourish ending with Bob.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bob (Weir) provides inventive, forceful guitar lines and striking falsetto vocals throughout the show.
band_member_comments.Drums: More electronic drums are heard in the Drum segment.
